class Solution:
    def minimumCoins(self, prices: List[int]) -> int:
        n = len(prices)
        dp = [float('inf')] * (n + 1)
        dp[0] = 0  # Base case: 0 cost to buy 0 fruits

        for i in range(1, n + 1):
            # Option 1: Buy the i-th fruit (1-indexed), paying prices[i-1]
            # Then, you can take the next i fruits for free
            # So, the next i fruits (i+1 to i+i) can be taken for free
            # So, we can update dp[i + i] to be min(dp[i + i], dp[i-1] + prices[i-1])
            # But we need to consider all positions up to n
            for j in range(i, min(n, i + i) + 1):
                dp[j] = min(dp[j], dp[i - 1] + prices[i - 1])

            # Option 2: Take the i-th fruit for free (if allowed by a previous purchase)
            # This is already handled by the dp transitions above

        return dp[n]
